_comment_sizing: 5% of balance per trade — matches Bot Settings Max Position Size slider.
_comment_strategies: 1) Opening Range Breakout (ORB) — first 30 min sets range, trade the breakout. 2) Supertrend + MACD — both indicators must agree.
_comment_sl_tp: SL = min(1.5×ATR, Bot Settings SL%). TP = max(3.0×ATR, Bot Settings TP%). Trailing stop if enabled in Bot Settings.
notes: v3: ORB strategy (professional Indian intraday method) + Supertrend/MACD. ATR-based SL/TP with hard limits from Bot Settings. No time-limit exits. EOD square-off at 15:15 still active.
